sources.name: BaziQA
known_risks: Dataset answer is not independent reality truth
Birth provenance is not embedded per item
Public repository may have training-data contamination
Multiple-choice format does not fully test open-ended reasoning

sources.name: MingLi-Bench
known_risks: Competition answer may encode a school-specific interpretation
Precomputed chart provider must be independently checked
Public repository may have training-data contamination
Country/location fields can be too coarse for time correction

sources.name: Astro-Databank
known_risks: Birth input only; event truth must come from an independent source
Reliability grade must be stored per case

sources.name: TriCube Prospective Dynamic Cases
known_risks: Question wording must be frozen before interpretation
Outcome evidence must be collected after the deadline
Scoring criteria must not be broadened after the fact
